name: Shrimp & Wine-Sauced Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in 2 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Add undrained tomatoes, white wine, sugar, and seasonings (oregano, basil, pepper).
3. Cover and simmer for 25 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and return to a gentle simmer until cooked through, about 5 more minutes.
5. Blend cornstarch in 1 tablespoon cold water, then stir into the shrimp mixture.
6. Cook until bubbly.
7. Serve over hot spaghetti and sprinkle with grated Romano cheese.
8. This dish is also excellent made with scallops or chicken.
